name: SOLITRON DEVICES INC
summary: PART I . GENERAL Solitron Devices, Inc., a Delaware corporation (the "Company" or "Solitron"), designs, develops, manufactures and markets solidstate semiconductor components and related devices primarily for the military and aerospace markets.The Company manufactures a large variety of bipolar and metal oxide semiconductor ("MOS") power transistors, power and control hybrids, junction and power MOS field effect transistors ("Power MOSFETS"), field effect transistors and other related products.M...
